case_title: SHELLEY A ESKRIDGE VS. ELOISE HORN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-23-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESKRIDGE, SHELLEY A ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED FEB-27-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HORNE, ELLA R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESKRIDGE, SHELLEY A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORNE, ELLA R. $6,057.31 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,132.31, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY COST DIRECTLY TO THE COURT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF WAS GRANTED A FEE WAIVER. PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK REIMBURSEMENT FROM DEFENDANT FOR THE PURCHASE OF A REFRIGERATOR IN 2018 IF PLAINTIFF PROVIDES COPY OF THE PAID RECEIPT AND PHOTO CERTIFYING THE REFRIGERATOR IS IN THE PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHELLY A. ESKRIDGE IS PRESENT. SHELLENA ESKRIDGE TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ELLA R. HORNE IS PRESENT. CEDRIC HORN AND CLIFTON TURNER, TESTIFY ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF .DURING TRIAL, DEFENDANT STATES HER TRUE NAME TO BE ELLA R. HORNE. DEFENDANTS NAME IS CORRECTED IN OPEN COURT DURING TRIAL FROM ELOISE HORN TO THE TRUE NAME OF ELLA R. HORNE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-02-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 624

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2020 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. ELOISE HORN DOES NOT OWE SHELLEY A. ESKRIDGE ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEPTEMBER 23, 2020. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ESKRIDGE, SHELLEY A EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT WAS GRANTED A FEE WAIVER. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Set For Trial On Dec-02-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 624

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Continued To Dec-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tara Macomber, Esq., for and with Shelley Eskridge, Plaintiff/Respondent; Eloise Horn, Defendant/Appellant; Cedric Horn, Defendant's nephew.

This matter comes on for trial de novo. All witnesses are placed under oath.

Mr. Cedric Horn testifies on behalf of Defendant/Appellant Eloise Horn.

The following exhibits are identified:

Exh. A - San Francisco Housing Authority S8 Resident Worksheets (3)
Exh. B - Lease Agreement - 11/02/04
Exh. C - "Exhibit A" - Lease Agreement - 11/02/04

Ms. Shelley Eskridge testifies on behalf of herself.

The following exhibits are identified:

Exh. 1 - Photograph - Refrigerator and receipt of purchase - 07/02/19
Exh. 2 - Letter - Open Door Legal to Eskridge - Re: Escrow Account - 07/02/19
Cashier's Check - 7095812395 - $1,350.00 - 09/21/18

The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported D624

Judge: Hon. Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. D624
